title: 大阪杯の後に・遥かに高い走り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky wins the race with a performance that
impresses even Symboli Rudolf, and then sets her
sights on the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf vows to have a rematch with
Maruzensky and declares her intention to surpass
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Maruzensky's racing, which has
fascinated many, has an altogether different
effect on certain others...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder begin to feel
that catching up to Maruzensky is a dream too far
out of reach.
